name.description: Name of the resource. First character must be a lowercase letter, and all following characters must be a dash, lowercase letter, or digit, except the last character, which cannot be a dash.

network.description: The network the router belongs to.

bgp.type: list(object({ asn: string, advertise_mode: optional(string), advertised_groups: string, advertised_ip_ranges: list(object({ range: string, description: optional(string) })), keepalive_interval: optional(number) }))
bgp.description: BGP information specific to this router.

encrypted_interconnect_router.description: Indicates if a router is dedicated for use with encrypted VLAN attachments
